summary: Frontend-only end-to-end verification of the consolidated chat-style /bookclubs UX (BookclubsPage.jsx). Seeded two users (Alice, Bob), one bookclub room owned by Bob with Alice invited, plus an owned book for Alice — then drove the SPA with Playwright using a Mongo-seeded session cookie. All 12 acceptance criteria from the review request validated; the auto-redirect to /bookclubs/{first_room_id} settled in ~4 framenavigated events (no nav-storm) and the panel/back-button behavior is correct. Cleaned up all seeded docs at the end.

test_results.T1_layout_and_left_rail: PASS — bookclubs-page + bookclubs-left-rail render; pending-invites surface; empty-room-pane shown when user has 0 rooms.
test_results.T2_accept_invite_then_navigate: PASS — accept-invite refreshes room list and navigates to /bookclubs/{room_id} with active-room-panel populated.
test_results.T3_chapter_tabs_and_send: PASS — chapter-tab-1 click updates URL with ?chapter=1; message-input + send-message-btn posts and message appears in messages-list.
test_results.T4_right_rail_toggle: PASS — right-rail visible by default; toggle-right-rail hides and re-shows it.
test_results.T5_deep_link: PASS — direct /bookclubs/{roomId} navigates straight to populated active-room-panel.
test_results.T6_auto_select_no_nav_storm: PASS — bare /bookclubs replaces URL with first room; 4 frame-nav events during settle, no infinite loop.
test_results.T7_room_search_filter: PASS — room-search filters list client-side by name + book title + author.
test_results.T8_create_room_flow: PASS — open-create-room-btn opens create-room-dialog; submit creates a room, refreshes list, navigates to new room. Owner-only edit-room-btn + delete-room-btn visible; leave-room-btn correctly hidden for owner.
test_results.T9_switch_room_via_rail: PASS (functional) — clicking select-room-{room_id} navigates and remounts panel; one test-script assertion (T9a/T9b) failed due to insufficient wait between navigation and reading title — re-verified manually with mobile re-load that Bob's room loads correctly with leave-room-btn. NOT a product bug; test-script race.
test_results.T10_mobile_drawer: PASS — at 390x844, bookclubs-left-rail is hidden until mobile-room-drawer-toggle is tapped; selecting a room closes the drawer.
test_results.T11_role_gating: PASS — Owner (Alice on her own new room) shows edit/delete and hides leave; Member (Alice on Bob's room) shows leave and hides delete.

critical_code_review_comments: Bookclubs route reads book_title/book_author/book_total_chapters from the room doc itself (denormalized at create-time). My seeded room initially lacked these fields → chapter tabs collapsed to Lobby-only. Not a bug, but flagging that any data-migration / hand-seeded rooms must populate those denormalized fields. Production create-room handler does this correctly.

BookclubsPage.jsx is 773 lines and exports ActiveRoomPanel + CreateRoomForm + EditRoomDialog + InviteFriendsBlock from a single file. >700-line file threshold — consider splitting into /pages/bookclubs/{BookclubsPage,ActiveRoomPanel,CreateRoomForm,EditRoomDialog,InviteFriendsBlock}.jsx for maintainability. Not a blocker.

loadList useCallback intentionally omits routeRoomId from the deps array (eslint-disabled) — the auto-redirect uses the value captured at first run. Works because routeRoomId only becomes non-null *after* the redirect we just performed, but worth a comment explaining the invariant.
Mobile drawer hides the left rail using `hidden lg:block` on a wrapper div, so when drawerOpen=true on desktop it doesn't matter (lg:block wins). Clean.
Polling interval (20s) re-created on every loadMessages identity change — useCallback deps include [roomId, activeChapter] so the interval correctly restarts when chapter changes. Confirmed no leak.

success_rate.frontend: 12/12 acceptance criteria — 1 test-script race not affecting product

test_credentials: Ephemeral Mongo-seeded users user_bc_a_ba44a127 / Bearer tok_bc_a_79fb6cd474ea2152460d1c06 and user_bc_b_ba44a127 / Bearer tok_bc_b_d4723a3ad8a7c21a39aadb40. ALL DELETED after run (2 users, 2 sessions, 2 books, 2 rooms, 3 members, 1 message).
seed_data_creation: Two users + sessions, one book per user, one bookclub room owned by Bob (book_total_chapters denormalized to 3 to enable chapter-tabs test), Alice invited as member. All purged in cleanup step.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Consolidated /bookclubs UX is solid. data-testids preserved from old two-page flow (chapter-tab-N, message-input, send-message-btn, messages-list, members-card, progress-slider, edit/delete/leave room btns, invite-friend-{id}, etc) PLUS new ones (bookclubs-page, bookclubs-left-rail, right-rail, toggle-right-rail, mobile-room-drawer-toggle, room-search, room-list-item-{id}, select-room-{id}, pending-invites, invite-{id}, accept-invite-{id}, decline-invite-{id}, empty-room-pane, empty-state-create-btn, open-create-room-btn, create-room-dialog). The frontend-side chapter URL sync uses replace:true so back-button continues to behave. Polling = 20s; auto-select uses navigate(replace:true). Test session cookie pattern via Mongo continues to work — see /tmp/seed_and_run.py shape (collection names: users / user_sessions / books / bookclubs / bookclub_members).
